answer_en:
Levator Ani m.
(Iliococcygeus, Pubococcygeus, and Puborectalis mm.)
Provides structural support to adjacent pelvic structures
Resists increases in intra-abdominal pressure
Maintains fecal continence
Aids in ejaculation

details: Provides structural support to adjacent pelvic structures
